source.name: Playwright Actions/Input
source.license_notes: Summarized guidance with source link; do not copy full docs.

goal: Upload files reliably through file inputs, file chooser events, iframe-aware locators, and upload verification.
when_to_use: Upload button opens OS file picker
steps: Prefer locator.setInputFiles on the actual input[type=file].
If a file chooser opens, wait for page.waitForEvent('filechooser') then setFiles.
For iframes, locate frame first then target the input inside it.
After setting file, wait for filename/progress/success state.
failure_modes: Targeting styled div instead of input
safety_notes: Do not click publish/submit after upload unless requested.
Never upload private files without explicit path confirmation.

quality.notes: Playwright input docs cover interacting with inputs and upload flows; local pitfalls added.

retrieval.ai_summary: For file upload, verify the path, target the real input[type=file] or filechooser, handle iframe context, then wait for filename/progress/success evidence.
